name: BVLOS Smart RTL and Failsafe Configuration
description: You are a UAV Operator preparing for a Beyond Visual Line of Sight (BVLOS) powerline inspection flight near Zurich. A standard straight-line Return-to-Launch (RTL) could cause the drone to strike the transmission wires, so you must configure 'Smart RTL' to make the drone backtrack along its safe outbound path in case of emergencies. Following the safety directive on your workstation, configure the 5 required Smart RTL failsafe parameters and create exactly 2 emergency Rally Points at the specified coordinates. Save the plan file containing the Rally Points to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/bvlos_failsafe.plan.
